description: Leave a comment on a LinkedIn post. Navigates to the post, clicks the Comment button to expand the comment area, types the comment text using fill_slowly at 15ms/char, and submits via keyboard (Ctrl+Enter) or the Post comment button.

reasoning.research: LinkedIn comment flow: navigate to post → click 'Comment' button (social actions bar) → comment text input expands (a Quill editor) → type comment → submit with Ctrl+Enter or click 'Post comment' button. The comment box is a separate Quill instance from the post composer.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use role=button[name='Comment'] for the social actions Comment button. The comment textbox uses role=textbox[name='Add a comment...'] or a similar ARIA label. Ctrl+Enter submits without needing to locate the submit button. fill_slowly at 15ms/char for anti-bot compliance.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Wait 400ms after clicking Comment for the text area to expand and Quill to initialize. Type at 15ms/char. Ctrl+Enter is the most reliable submit method — avoids locating a dynamically-labeled submit button.
reasoning.llm_learnings: LinkedIn comment box: (1) Click role=button[name='Comment'] in the social actions bar to expand it. (2) Comment input has ARIA label 'Add a comment...' or similar. (3) Quill is used — must use fill_slowly. (4) Ctrl+Enter submits the comment. (5) After submission, the comment appears below the post and the text area clears.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 3s + comment expand 0.4s + focus 0.1s + typing variable (15ms/char) + submit 0.5s. For 100-char comment: ~1.5s typing. Total: ~6-7s typical.

post_url.description: Full URL of the LinkedIn post to comment on.

comment_text.description: Text of the comment. Plain text. Max ~1250 characters.
comment_text.example: Great insights! The point about human-AI collaboration resonates deeply with what we're seeing in practice.

comment_button.note: Social actions bar Comment button. Expands the comment input area below the post.

comment_button_fallback.note: Attribute-based fallback for the Comment button.

comment_textbox.note: Comment Quill editor. Note Unicode ellipsis in 'Add a comment…' — may vary.

comment_textbox_fallback.note: Class-based fallback targeting comment box Quill editor specifically.

submit_keyboard.note: Most reliable submit method. Ctrl+Enter posts the comment.

execution_trace.note: Navigate to post. Must be logged in.
Type comment at 15ms/char to satisfy LinkedIn's anti-bot detection.
Submit the comment. Wait 1s for LinkedIn API to post and UI to update.
Confirm comment appears in the comment thread.

comment_text.example: Great insights! The point about human-AI collaboration resonates deeply.

output_example.comment_text: Great insights! The point about human-AI collaboration resonates deeply with what we're seeing in practice.

metadata.safety_note: Not idempotent — running twice will post duplicate comments. Verify intent before running.
